title: astragalus californicus
intro: Astragalus californicus, also known as California milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus californicus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw supplement or added to soups and stews for its medicinal properties.
